name: I'm on the shore of a lake
description: I'm on the shore of a lake
hints: There are two important items here. The axe has a magic word on it - remember it for later.
The golden fish is a treasure but you need something to catch it. The net from the chasm bottom would work.
You need the golden net to catch the fish. The axe and its magic word BUNYON are critical for another puzzle.
GET AXE. To catch the fish, bring the golden net here and use it. Be careful going NORTH - quicksand bog is dangerous!
notes: Lakeside area with two key items: the rusty axe (magic word BUNYON for Paul Bunyon) and the golden fish treasure (needs the golden net to catch). North leads to dangerous quicksand. The sign warns against swimming.
